draw_order: Phase A: 648 LCG uniforms → ε samples (1 uniform each)
Phase B: 1296 LCG uniforms → d_sup_noise (Box-Muller, 2 uniforms each)
Phase C: 1296 LCG uniforms → d_style_noise (Box-Muller, 2 uniforms each)

d_sup.form: d_sup(h) = D_SUP_INTERCEPT + D_SUP_SLOPE · min(h, D_SUP_CLAMP_H) + N(0, D_SUP_NOISE_SD)
d_sup.provenance: BOUNDARY_MAP L4: '~0.5° across h=0-22°' (linear fit). Clamp at 22° to NOT extrapolate the receipt.

d_unanch_rendered_optional.provenance: Synthetic atlas-step nuisance prior. NOT strongly BOUNDARY_MAP-derived. Pre-registered as decoy structure.

d_unanch_named_only.provenance: Synthetic atlas-step nuisance prior. NOT strongly BOUNDARY_MAP-derived.

d_style.provenance: Synthetic distributional nuisance. Pre-registered linear correlation strength.

ols_fit.runtime_rule: (w,b) are CONSTANTS at runtime; never refit. True h is read only at this pre-run fit step. The runtime decoy ridge D(q_h; d) reads (w,b) and observable d only.
